metadata.title: Configure Syslog Forwarding for Enterprise DLP
metadata.description:
Configure one or more Log Forwarding profiles to forward Enterprise Data Loss Prevention (E-DLP)
        incidents syslogs to manage and create workflows.
metadata.keywords: Cloud Services - App, Enterprise DLP Getting Started, Getting Started, Data Filtering, Task, Cloud-Delivered Security Services, Enterprise DLP

text:
Edit the Enterprise DLP Data Filtering Settings
Previous

metadata.title: Edit the Enterprise DLP Data Filtering Settings
metadata.description:
Edit the Enterprise Data Loss Prevention (E-DLP) data filtering settings to specify the actions the
        firewall using Enterprise DLP takes if the data filtering settings are
        exceeded.
metadata.keywords: Cloud Services - App, Enterprise DLP Getting Started, Getting Started, Data Filtering, Task, Cloud-Delivered Security Services, Enterprise DLP

markdown:
# Edit the Enterprise DLP Data Filtering Settings

Previous

Edit the Cloud Content Settings

text:
Edit the Enterprise DLP Snippet Settings
Previous
Edit the Enterprise DLP Data Filtering Settings

metadata.title: Edit the Enterprise DLP Snippet Settings
metadata.description:
The Enterprise Data Loss Prevention (E-DLP) snippet settings allow you to configure if and how
        snippets of matched traffic are stored in the DLP cloud service.
metadata.keywords: Cloud Services - App, Enterprise DLP Getting Started, Getting Started, Data Filtering, Task, Cloud-Delivered Security Services, Enterprise DLP

        existing on-premises third party DLP solutions with Enterprise Data Loss Prevention (E-DLP).
